violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Panini grill not located under hood.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cutting board at prep cooler has build-up of food debris and is in need of cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. FOH cabinets/counters have build up of coffee grounds and debris and need cleaning.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. Restrooms not provided with mechanical ventilation.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in coffee prep area. Clean under and around equipment/refrigeration units/ice machine.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Doorway between FOH & BOH not cased out. Large hole in wall at utility sink needs repair.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop currently placed in utility sink. Store in a manner that promotes proper drying.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Fly strip hung from light fixture above prep table cooler in kitchen.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate. Current staff do not hold food service manager's certificate.
